name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new template, lesson, or IDE feature.

labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

## What do you want?

<!-- A clear one-paragraph description of the feature. -->

## Why? Who benefits?

<!-- Is this for beginners? Teachers? Makers? Hobbyists? A specific project you're trying to build? -->

## How could it work?

<!-- If you have an idea of how it should behave, sketch it here. UI flow, button names, what appears where. -->

## Does this fit the project's principles?

- [ ] Works anywhere (runs in browser AND the iOS app without friction)
- [ ] Beginner-first (a 10-year-old could use it)
- [ ] Self-contained (no external IDE required)
- [ ] No subscriptions, no ads, no account required

## Anything else?

<!-- Related projects, similar features in other tools, or links. -->
